elements.title: lang::report_page_063_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_qz.id                                                           AS id,
       kbi_c.id                                                            AS courseid,
       kbi_c.fullname                                                      AS course,
       kbi_cm.id                                                           AS cmid,
       kbi_qz.id                                                           AS quizid,
       kbi_qz.name                                                         AS quiz_name,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_slot.id)                                         AS question_slots,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_qa.userid)                                       AS learners_attempted,
       COUNT(kbi_qa.id)                                                    AS attempts,
       SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_qa.state = 'finished' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)          AS finished_attempts,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN kbi_qz.sumgrades > 0 THEN (kbi_qa.sumgrades * 100 / kbi_qz.sumgrades) ELSE NULL END), 2) AS average_score_percent,
       ROUND(MIN(CASE WHEN kbi_qz.sumgrades > 0 THEN (kbi_qa.sumgrades * 100 / kbi_qz.sumgrades) ELSE NULL END), 2) AS minimum_score_percent,
       ROUND(MAX(CASE WHEN kbi_qz.sumgrades > 0 THEN (kbi_qa.sumgrades * 100 / kbi_qz.sumgrades) ELSE NULL END), 2) AS maximum_score_percent,
       ROUND(STDDEV_POP(CASE WHEN kbi_qz.sumgrades > 0 THEN (kbi_qa.sumgrades * 100 / kbi_qz.sumgrades) ELSE NULL END), 2) AS standard_deviation_percent,
       ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN kbi_qa.timefinish > kbi_qa.timestart THEN kbi_qa.timefinish - kbi_qa.timestart ELSE NULL END), 0) AS average_duration,
       ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_gi.gradepass > 0 AND kbi_gg.finalgrade >= kbi_gi.gradepass THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(kbi_qa.id), 0), 2) AS pass_rate_percent
FROM mdl_quiz kbi_qz
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_qz.course
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = 'quiz'
       JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id AND kbi_cm.instance = kbi_qz.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_quiz_slots kbi_slot ON kbi_slot.quizid = kbi_qz.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_quiz_attempts kbi_qa ON kbi_qa.quiz = kbi_qz.id AND kbi_qa.preview = 0
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.itemmodule = 'quiz' AND kbi_gi.iteminstance = kbi_qz.id AND kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_gg ON kbi_gg.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_gg.userid = kbi_qa.userid
WHERE kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
GROUP BY kbi_qz.id, kbi_c.id, kbi_cm.id, kbi_gi.gradepass
ORDER BY kbi_c.fullname, kbi_qz.name
